description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.49.0

You can now create printable cards for bus stops.

• 🖨️ Create printable cards for bus stops — Make cards with QR codes linking to stop timetables in various sizes: L-size, business card, or folded. Save the image and print it at a convenience store photo printer or on your home or office printer.

• 🚏 Access from the stop page — Open the card maker from the "Create a printable card" option at the bottom of the "Departing from ○○" page.
